task-1768650435214-hm524e.description: TDD workflow for SimplePay integration refinement

task-1768757786041-2h0qm0.description: Create USACF Sprint 1-4 and Q2 task files following existing template conventions

task-1775427490715-g23v1n.description: P1-01: Add Notification model to Prisma schema with NotificationType and NotificationPriority enums. Add notifications relation to Tenant model. Run prisma generate.
task-1775427490715-g23v1n.result: Schema migration complete - Notification model + NotificationType/NotificationPriority enums added to Prisma schema

task-1775427490723-3dje0r.description: P1-02: Create in-app notification types (CreateNotificationDto, NotificationListQuery, NotificationListResponse) and InAppNotificationService with CRUD + cursor pagination
task-1775427490723-3dje0r.result: InAppNotificationService, types, DTOs created with cursor pagination and CRUD. 12 unit tests passing.

task-1775427490726-st6p7q.description: P1-03: Create BullMQ NotificationProcessor and NotificationEmitter helper with notifyAdmins/notifyParent/notifyStaff methods
task-1775427490726-st6p7q.result: NotificationProcessor (BullMQ) and NotificationEmitter helper created. 13 unit tests passing.

task-1775427490729-hyfl1j.description: P1-04: Create notification REST API controllers for admin (JWT), parent (parent-token), and staff (staff-token) portals with list, unread-count, mark-read, mark-all-read endpoints
task-1775427490729-hyfl1j.result: Admin, Parent, Staff notification controllers created with proper auth guards. NotificationApiModule wired into ApiModule.

task-1775427490731-wmmh94.description: P1-05: Write unit tests for InAppNotificationService, NotificationProcessor, NotificationEmitter, and notification controllers
task-1775427490731-wmmh94.result: 25 unit tests across 3 test files all passing. Covers service CRUD, processor persistence+WebSocket, emitter fire-and-forget.
